description_en: A tangible cultural property, the fire bell (hanshō) of Sekiguchi Bunjiro. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Japanese primrose (sakurasō), designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the camellia grove (tsubaki-gun) at Tsubakimori, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the nutmeg tree (kaya) at Futawatari, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the square bamboo grove (shihōchiku-gun) of Senryu-in, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Japanese White Oak of Shirahige Shrine
description_en: A monument, the Japanese white oak (shirakashi) of Shirahige Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the zelkova (keyaki) of Shirataki Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Iroha Maple of the Aihara Family Residence
description_en: A monument, the iroha maple (irohakaede) at the Aihara family residence, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Japanese elm (harunire) of Suwa Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Fused Tree of the Hikobe Family
description_en: A monument, the fused tree (gattai-boku), a standing tree, at the Hikobe family, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Hoin nutmeg tree (kaya) of Ryuko-ji, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Great Boxwood of the Yabuzuka Family
description_en: A monument, the great boxwood (ōtsuge) of the Yabuzuka family, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the ring-cupped oak (arakashi) at Kaburagi, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Okame cherry tree at Tsuchihashi, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the double-flowered camellia (yaetsubaki) at Itabashi, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Okaku cherry tree at Fuju-zawa, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Wart Stone of Sori Kannon Hall
description_en: A monument, the wart stone (ibo-ishi), a geological and rock feature, at Sori Kannon Hall, designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Kamo Shrine. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Shirataki Shrine. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the production techniques of Kiryu Japanese paper (washi). It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Million-Repetition Nembutsu of the Minazawa District
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the million-repetition nembutsu (hyakumanben nenbutsu) of the Minazawa district. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the Kiryu kiyari work chant. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Okagari Bonfire Rite of Kamo Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Okagari bonfire rite (shinji) of Kamo Shrine. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the Jizo-Bon million-repetition nembutsu (hyakumanben nenbutsu). It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the Wakumaru lion dance known as the Sasara Mai. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
An intangible folk cultural property, the Maedahara lion dance (shishimai). It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Successive Graves of the Kiryu Clan
description_en: A monument, the successive-generation graves of the Kiryu clan, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the site of the Umehara mansion (yakata), designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_romaji: Nihon Orimono Kabushiki Gaisha Hatsudensho Ato oyobi Rengazumi Ikō
name_en: Power Plant Site and Brickwork Remains of the Nihon Orimono Company
description_en: A monument, the power plant site and brickwork remains of the Nihon Orimono (Japan Textile) Company, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the site of Kiryu Hishakuyama Castle, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the grave of Yura Narishige, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Tenjin ancient burial mound (kofun) at Kobayashi, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Momoi mound, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the site of the Yatsu mansion (yakata), designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A monument, the Choja-zuka ancient burial mound (kofun), designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A tangible cultural property, an edict board (seisatsu) bearing the Hojo clan's tiger seal. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1971-05-01. It is located at Ryuko-ji, Takane-cho 401.
A tangible cultural property, the calligraphy (shoseki) of Ikuta Yorozu. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1973-04-01. It is held at the First Museum, Shiro-machi 3-1.
A tangible cultural property, a bronze bell (dōshō). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1975-03-06. It is located at Fusai-ji, Habatsuke-cho 1691.

name_en: Map of the Tatebayashi Castle Town
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a pictorial map (ezu) of the Tatebayashi castle town. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1977-08-30. It is located at Chiyoda-cho 4-29.

A tangible cultural property, a letter (shojō) of Matsudaira Takechika, known as the Sansho letter. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1978-05-25. It is held at the First Museum, Shiro-machi 3-1.
